chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Appln. No. 2265 of 2024. ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature(s) of the Judge(s) ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ For orders as to Non-Prosecution. 05.05.2025. ************ None has appeared on behalf of the appellant and no intimation has been received. The record reflects that both the appellant and his counsel have repeatedly remained absent, which is the reason the instant Criminal Bail Appln. has been pending since 2024. However, the same position is today and no progress has been made since then. It appears that the applicant has also failed to comply with the office objection. Such fact prima facie shows that the applicant has lost interest in pursuing the instant Criminal Bail Appln. Such fact has left this Court with no other option, except to dismiss the same for non-prosecution. Order accordingly. J U D G E Manthar Brohi
